scripts.dev: npm run build -w @warehouse/shared && concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @warehouse/server" "npm run dev -w @warehouse/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @warehouse/shared && npm run build -w @warehouse/web && npm run build -w @warehouse/server
scripts.test: npm run build -w @warehouse/shared && npm run test -w @warehouse/shared && npm run test -w @warehouse/server
